title: IIAhmadGamer's 3D Tools
description: This texture pack make all tools 3D including the mace, it work on every single version from 1.9-1.21.11+
body:
# 🌐 Makes all tools 3D including the mace!
![3D Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6ce979ce323760f67367f77e97a457808b61c9_0.webp)

# ⭐ Features
- extremely easy to customize if you know what you're doing ✅
- doesnt interfere with any packs no matter what ✅
- supports every single version from 1.9 to 1.21.11+ ✅
- all tools glow and become reflective when using shaders like **[Photon Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)** ✅

# ⚠️ Compatibility
if you play on a server with a custom texture pack, you're gonna have to use a mod that allows you to place the pack on top of the server's pack

recommended: **[My Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/my-resource-pack)**

# ⛔ YouTube
if you like my work and you wanna support me make sure to check **[My YouTube Channel](https://youtube.com/@IIAhmadGamer?sub_confirmation=1)**
